name: BB:UBA : Cloud Endpoints
notes: List of log source types for cloud end-point applications.
bb_references: BB:UBA : Cloud Endpoints on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of IBM Bluemix Platform, Microsoft Office 365, Box, Salesforce Security Monitoring, Amazon AWS CloudTrail, Microsoft Azure
TD_list: APPLY BB:UBA : Cloud Endpoints on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of IBM Bluemix Platform, Microsoft Office 365, Box, Salesforce Security Monitoring, Amazon AWS CloudTrail, Microsoft Azure
